overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exploring the historic city of Saint Denis. The character moves through tropical courtyards, narrow interior passages, busy streets with horse-drawn carriages, and tight back alleyways with brick walls. The scene features high-fidelity game graphics with strong midday sunlight casting dramatic shadows across cobblestone surfaces and period architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical courtyard with stone archways and fountain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a sunlit courtyard with tropical plants and stone architecture

entered.detail: large weathered stone archway framing the entrance to the courtyard
simple wooden bench sitting against the left wall
circular stone fountain basin in the center of the courtyard
large tropical plants in terracotta pots lining the walkway
tall white ceramic vase with greenery near the far archway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a serene tropical courtyard with cobblestone flooring and dense vegetation. Stone archways frame the path ahead while a central fountain and wooden bench sit among potted palm plants. The space is enclosed by weathered stone walls with partial sky visibility above.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow interior stairwell connecting courtyard to street

events.description: enters dark interior passage from bright courtyard
exits dark passage into bright sunlight of the main street

agents.ego_description: climbing white wooden stairs through a narrow brick corridor to reach the street level

entered.detail: steep white-painted wooden stairs with railings leading upward
exposed red brick walls of the narrow interior passage
stone archway at the end of the passage leading to bright daylight

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open courtyard into a narrow, dimly lit interior passage with brick walls and a steep white wooden staircase. The lighting shifts dramatically from bright natural sun to shadowy interior before emerging through a stone archway exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with tram tracks and horse traffic

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the street
character turns right into a narrow alleyway between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt street avoiding horse-drawn carriages and exploring the historic district

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with white canvas cover moving along the tram tracks
pedestrians standing near the furnished rooms storefront

entered.detail: multi-story historic buildings with balconies and wrought iron railings
metal tram tracks embedded in the dirt road surface
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and wires spanning the street
covered wagon pulled by horses moving along the street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a bustling historic city street with tram tracks and period architecture. Horse-drawn carriages pass by on the road while the character walks along the sidewalk past storefronts and telegraph poles. The scene is brightly lit with strong midday sun casting shadows across the dirt street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow brick alleyway with wooden structures and posters

events.description: turns from open street into narrow shaded alley between brick buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight back alleyways with brick walls and wooden obstacles

entered.detail: tall weathered red brick walls forming the narrow alley corridor
stacked wooden crates and boxes along the alley wall
colorful vintage poster advertising circus performers on the brick wall
external wooden staircase attached to the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow, shaded alleyway enclosed by tall red brick walls. The space features wooden crates, external staircases, and vintage circus posters plastered on the walls. The lighting becomes diffused and cooler as the character moves away from the direct sunlight of the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with wooden structures leading to open area

events.description: passes a man leaning against the wall smoking in the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the final narrow passage toward an open exit with a wooden cart visible ahead

notable_agents.action: man leaning against brick wall smoking a cigarette

entered.detail: rear wooden facade of building with balconies and support beams
wooden wagon or cart parked near the alley exit
tall stone wall marking the boundary of the property
ornate black metal street lamp in the alleyway

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the narrow back alley, passing a man leaning against the brick wall smoking. The environment features wooden building rears, overgrown vegetation, and a metal lamp post. The character approaches an exit where a wooden cart is visible in the open area beyond the stone wall boundary.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a serene tropical courtyard into the bustling streets and shaded back alleys of a historic city. It begins amidst dense vegetation and stone archways in a sunlit courtyard, moving past a central fountain and potted palms before passing through a stone archway into a dimly lit interior passage. As the character ascends past a white wooden staircase, the scene shifts dramatically from deep shadows back into the bright midday sun of a busy city street filled with tram tracks and horse-drawn carriages. The camera then turns away from the open road into a narrow, shaded alleyway enclosed by tall red brick walls and vintage circus posters, where the lighting becomes diffused and cool. Finally, the path leads past a smoking man and overgrown vegetation toward a distant wooden cart visible beyond the alley's stone boundary.
